description: Extracts final normalized patient intake fields from Alex Aspargo voice calls for reconciliation in Supabase.
name: Alex Aspargo Intake Output

schema.description: Final normalized Aspargo clinical intake answers extracted from the completed call.

allergies.description: All allergies or medication allergies mentioned by the patient. Use an empty array if none were reported.

items.description: Short one-line description of the allergy.

blood_conditions.description: Whether the patient reports a blood condition such as sickle cell anemia, multiple myeloma, or leukemia.

chest_pain_or_shortness_of_breath.description: Whether the patient experiences chest pain or severe shortness of breath with light exercise.

ed_symptoms.description: Whether the patient reports difficulty getting or maintaining an erection.

high_bp_or_alpha_blockers.description: Whether the patient has uncontrolled high blood pressure or takes alpha-blocker medications.

other_medications.description: Prescription medications, supplements, or other daily medications mentioned by the patient. Use an empty array if none were reported.

items.description: Short one-line description of the medication or supplement.

penile_conditions.description: Whether the patient reports priapism history or penile shape conditions such as Peyronie disease.

recent_cardio_event.description: Whether the patient had a heart attack, stroke, or heart surgery in the past six months.

recent_normal_bp.description: Whether the patient had blood pressure checked in the last six months and it was in a normal range.

severe_conditions.description: Whether the patient reports severe liver disease, kidney disease, bleeding disorder, active stomach ulcers, or NAION.

uses_nitrates_or_poppers.description: Whether the patient currently takes nitrates or uses recreational poppers.
